description_long: This is a rectangular grocery bag with a flat, structured body and a single, prominent loop handle attached at the top. The front face of the bag features a printed image of a person with distinctive facial markings and dreadlocks, set against a blurred background. The back of the bag is a dark, muted green with a central vertical light gray stripe and a faint, radiating highlight, as well as a small black mark. The sides of the bag are narrow and dark, with the handle appearing to be made of a flexible, possibly fabric material. The bag appears to be made of a semi-rigid material, likely a combination of plastic and fabric, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight feel. The overall design suggests it is intended for carrying groceries or personal items in an urban environment.
description: A rectangular grocery bag with a loop handle, featuring a printed image of a person on the front and a dark, patterned back. The bag is semi-rigid and likely made of plastic and fabric.
description_view_0: Front view showing a printed image of a person with facial markings and dreadlocks, and the loop handle above.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the bag's narrow profile and the thickness of the material, with the handle visible from the side.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a dark green surface with a central light gray stripe and a faint highlight, plus a small black mark.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the bag's narrow edge and the handle from the side.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Printed image of a person with facial markings and dreadlocks on the front.
